data.title: Bitcoin Faces Bearish Options Activity Amid Market Weakness
data.description: According to Odaily, analyst Adam from Greeks.live shared insights on the X platform, highlighting significant bearish options activity for Bitcoin (BTC). He noted that $600 million in nominal value of bearish options accounted for a quarter of the total transactions today. Two bearish calendar trades alone were valued at $110 million this evening, indicating a weakening market and declining confidence. The short-term skew is nearing zero, while medium to long-term skew and implied volatility have also noticeably decreased. The outlook for February appears bleak, with a substantial number of altcoins set to unlock in the first quarter, contributing to the current tight liquidity in the market.

data.title: Dutch Court Approves Release of Alexey Pertsev with Electronic Monitoring
data.description: According to Odaily, Alexey Pertsev has announced that a Dutch court has approved the suspension of his pre-trial detention. He is set to be released on February 7 at 10:00 UTC+8, under the condition of electronic monitoring.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Vitalik Buterin Comments On Tornado Cash Developer's Release
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin shared a tweet from Tornado Cash developer Alexey Pertsev, adding the comment 'Milady.' Pertsev's tweet announced that he would be released on February 7 at 10 a.m. under electronic monitoring, as decided by a Dutch court. Although he stated that this is not complete freedom, he expressed relief at not being in jail. Pertsev mentioned that this development allows him to continue his appeal and fight for justice. He also extended his gratitude to those who supported him, acknowledging their role in making this possible.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a 3.08% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 06, 2025, 15:54 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,688.5 USDT, with a narrowed 3.08% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: TornadoCash developer Alexey Pertsev allowed to be released from prison on February 7 and put on electronic monitoring
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Alexey Pertsev’s statement, the Dutch court has approved the suspension of his pre-trial detention. He will be released at 10:00 on February 7, but he will be subject to electronic monitoring.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 97,000 USDT with a 1.11% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 06, 2025, 15:48 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 97,000 USDT and is now trading at 96,982 USDT, with a narrowed 1.11% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has exploded more than 40 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 40.6487 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 38.8958 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 1.7529 million US dollars.

data.title: Greeks.live: Options market data shows that the market is weakening, and the market outlook in February is not optimistic
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live analyst Adam posted on the X platform: "BTC has seen a large number of put option block trades today, with a nominal value of $600 million accounting for a quarter of the total trades. Tonight alone, two bearish calendars are worth $110 million. The market is weakening, and confidence is also declining. The short-term Skew is close to 0, and the medium- and long-term Skew and IV have also fallen significantly. The market outlook for February is not optimistic. There are still a large number of altcoins waiting to be unlocked in the first quarter, and the market is currently short of funds."

data.title: Lido: V3 version is coming soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lido published a post on the X platform revealing that the V3 version will be launched soon.

data.title: Arbitrum Ambassador Program to Expand to South Korea and Brazil in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Arbitrum Ambassador Program will expand to South Korea and Brazil in 2025. Both countries have shown community participation and brought value to the Arbitrum ecosystem. It is reported that the program will be restarted in 2024, focusing on three key regions: India, Nigeria and Mexico.
